# Test executables.
#
# Two flavors:
#
#   1) Fixture round-trip tests, generated by tools/codegen.py and surfaced
#      via the ATSC3_PROTO_GENERATED_TESTS cache variable populated in
#      lib/CMakeLists.txt.
#
#   2) Hand-written unit tests under tests/, e.g. encoder_pipeline_test.
#
# Running `ctest --output-on-failure` from build/ exercises everything.

# 1) generated fixture tests
if(ATSC3_PROTO_GENERATED_TESTS)
    foreach(test_src ${ATSC3_PROTO_GENERATED_TESTS})
        get_filename_component(test_name ${test_src} NAME_WE)
        add_executable(${test_name} ${test_src})
        target_link_libraries(${test_name} PRIVATE atsc3_proto)
        target_include_directories(${test_name} PRIVATE
            ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/lib/generated
            /usr/include)
        add_test(NAME ${test_name} COMMAND ${test_name})
    endforeach()
else()
    message(STATUS "tests: no generated fixtures yet (M2 codegen not run)")
endif()

# 2) hand-written tests
add_executable(udp_ipv4_test udp_ipv4_test.cc)
target_include_directories(udp_ipv4_test PRIVATE ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/lib)
target_link_libraries(udp_ipv4_test PRIVATE atsc3_proto)
add_test(NAME udp_ipv4_test COMMAND udp_ipv4_test)

add_executable(encoder_pipeline_test
    encoder_pipeline_test.cc
    ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/gw/encoder_pipeline.cc)
target_include_directories(encoder_pipeline_test PRIVATE
    ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/gw
    ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/lib/generated)
target_link_libraries(encoder_pipeline_test PRIVATE atsc3_proto)
add_test(NAME encoder_pipeline_test COMMAND encoder_pipeline_test)
